tasks.name: Apply for the cheapest full-day nursery within 3 km for a 3-year-old starting on 2025-09-01
tasks.description: Find nurseries for a 3-year-old starting on 2025-09-01 within 3 km of home, filter to full-day care with a maximum monthly fee of 600, sort by fee low to high, and submit an application to the cheapest option that meets these criteria.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Find a nursery" or "Nurseries & Daycare."

In the search/filters area, set the age to "3 years," the desired start date to "2025-09-01," the distance to "Within 3 km of home," the care type to "Full day (8+ hours)," and the maximum monthly fee to "600."
Click the button labeled "Apply filters" or "Show results" to display matching nurseries.
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select the option "Monthly fee: Low to High."
Click on the first nursery card in the sorted results list (the cheapest nursery that matches your filters).
On the nursery detail page, click the button labeled "Apply for a place" to open the application form.

In the application form, enter child name "Alex Rivera" and date of birth "2022-06-15," select schedule "Monday–Friday, full day," enter parent phone "555-123-7890" and email "parent@example.com," and then click the "Submit application" button.

tasks.name: Save the earliest-opening highly rated Downtown nursery to favorites
tasks.description: Search for nurseries in the Downtown district with a rating of at least 4.5 stars that open no later than 07:00, sort by earliest opening time, and add the earliest-opening nursery that meets these criteria to the favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Find a nursery" or similar.
In the filters panel, set the district to "Downtown" and set the rating filter to show only nurseries with "4.5 stars & up."
Open the "Opening hours" filter and set the "Opens by" field to "07:00" to include nurseries that open at or before 07:00.
Click the button labeled "Apply filters" or "Show results" to update the list.
Use the sort dropdown above the results and select "Opening time: Earliest first."
Click on the first nursery in the sorted list (the earliest-opening nursery that matches your filters) to open its detail page.
On the nursery detail page, click the "Add to favorites" or "Save nursery" button to store this nursery in your favorites list.

tasks.name: Book a morning visit next Wednesday at a nearby nursery with a playground under 550 monthly fee
tasks.description: Find nurseries within 2 km for a 2-year-old that have a large outdoor playground and monthly fees of 550 or less, sort by rating, and book a visit for the next Wednesday between 09:00 and 11:00 at the highest-rated option.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Visits & Tours" or "Book a visit."
On the visit search page, set the child's age to "2 years" and the distance filter to "Within 2 km."
Open the "Facilities" or "Features" filter and check the option for "Large outdoor playground."
Set the maximum monthly fee field to "550" and click the button labeled "Search" or "Show nurseries" to update the results.
Use the sort dropdown above the results and select "Rating: High to Low."
Find the first nursery in the sorted list and click its "Book a visit" button or link.
In the date picker that appears, select the next Wednesday on the calendar and then choose a time slot between "09:00" and "11:00" from the available time options.

In the booking form, enter the parent name "Jordan Lee" and phone number "555-987-6543," select the reminder method "SMS" if a reminder option is available, and click the "Confirm visit" or "Book visit" button.
If a summary screen appears, click the button labeled "Finish" or "Done" to complete the booking flow.

tasks.name: Register a 4–5-year-old for two different July afternoon activities under 30 at the same center
tasks.description: Find municipal daycare activities for children aged 4–5 in July 2025, filter to afternoon sessions costing no more than 30 per session, and register for two different activities that take place at the same center, adding both to the registration list.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Activities & Holiday Programs" or similar.
On the activities page, set the age group filter to "4–5 years."
Open the date or month filter and select "July 2025" as the month.
In the time-of-day filter, select the option "Afternoon (after 15:00)."
In the fee or price filter, set the maximum session price to "30" and click the button labeled "Apply filters" or "Show activities."
Scroll through the results and identify one center; click the first activity card listed for that center to open its detail page.

On the activity detail page, click the "Register for this session" or "Add to registration" button, then in the registration form enter child name "Mia Carter" and select "1 child" before clicking "Add to registration list" or similar.
Use the breadcrumb navigation or a "Back to activities list" link to return to the filtered July 2025 results for age 4–5 and under 30.

In the results list, scroll until you find another activity card with the same center name as the first one and click its "Register" or "Add to registration" button to add this second activity to the existing registration list.

tasks.name: Use the fee calculator to compare half-day vs full-day costs and save the cheaper plan
tasks.description: Open the fee calculator, calculate monthly costs for a 2-year-old from a household with monthly income 3200 for both half-day and full-day schedules (5 days per week), compare the amounts, and save the schedule option that shows the lower monthly fee as the preferred plan.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Fees & Subsidies" or similar.
On the fees page, click the "Fee calculator" button or link to open the calculator tool.
In the calculator form, enter household monthly income "3200," select child's age "2 years," and choose schedule "Half-day (5 hours), 5 days per week."
Click the "Calculate fee" button to display the monthly fee for the half-day schedule.
Change the schedule option in the same form to "Full-day (9 hours), 5 days per week" while keeping the income and age fields unchanged.
Click the "Calculate fee" button again to display the monthly fee for the full-day schedule.
Compare the two displayed monthly amounts and click the "Save this plan" or "Set as preferred plan" button next to the schedule option that shows the lower fee.
In the dialog or field that appears, type the plan name "My chosen schedule" and click the "Save" button to store this selection.

tasks.name: Create a ranked application with three full-day nurseries in the North district ordered by rating
tasks.description: Find nurseries in the North district that offer full-day care for 1-year-olds, sort them by rating high to low, select the top three, and create an application where these three nurseries are added and ranked as preferences 1–3 according to their ratings (highest rated as preference 1).
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Find a nursery."
In the filters panel, set the age to "1 year," the district to "North," and the care type to "Full day (8+ hours)."
Click the button labeled "Apply filters" or "Show results" to display nurseries matching these criteria.
Use the sort dropdown above the results and select "Rating: High to Low."
In the sorted list, click the "Select" or "Add to application" button or checkbox for the first three nurseries in the list.
Click the button labeled "Start application with selected nurseries" or "Continue to application" to begin the multi-step application process.

On the preferences step, arrange the selected nurseries so that the highest-rated nursery (the first one you selected) is set as Preference 1, the second as Preference 2, and the third as Preference 3 using drag-and-drop or preference dropdowns.
In the child details section, enter the name "Noah Kim" and date of birth "2024-01-10."
Click the "Save preferences" or "Save and continue" button to store the ranked list of three nurseries in the application.

tasks.name: Find an allergy-friendly nursery and send a meals inquiry via the contact form
tasks.description: Search for nurseries within 4 km that offer both nut-free menus and lactose-free options, open one nursery’s details, then use the site’s contact form to send a message asking about allergy handling at that specific nursery, including your contact information.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Find a nursery."
In the filters panel, set the distance to "Within 4 km" and open the "Meals & diet" or similar filter section.
Within the meal filters, check both "Nut-free menu" and "Lactose-free options," then click the "Apply filters" or "Show results" button to update the list.
Click on the first nursery card in the filtered results list to open its detail page.
On the nursery detail page, click the tab or link labeled "Meals & Nutrition" or similar to view the meal policy information.
From the main navigation or from a link on the page, click on "Contact us" or "General inquiry" to open the contact form.
In the contact form, select the topic "Meals / Allergies" from the subject or category dropdown.
In the message textarea, type a question referencing this nursery, for example: "I would like to confirm how you handle nut and lactose allergies at [nursery name] for a 3-year-old child."
Fill in the remaining fields with parent name "Sara Patel," email "sara.patel@example.com," and phone number "555-222-3344," then click the "Send message" or "Submit" button.

tasks.name: Choose the first open day after 2025-08-15 from the closure calendar and start an application with that date
tasks.description: Use the calendar of holiday closures to find the first date after 2025-08-15 that is not marked as closed, then start a new application using that date as the desired start date for a 2-year-old in the East district with full-day care.
steps: From the homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Calendar & Closures" or similar.
On the calendar page, open the month selector and choose "August 2025."
In the calendar grid for August 2025, click on the first date after August 15 that is not marked as "Closed" to highlight it.
Click the button or link labeled "Apply from this date" or "Start application" associated with the highlighted date.
On the application page that opens, click into the "Desired start date" field to open the date picker and select the same date you highlighted on the closure calendar.
Set the child's age to "2 years" and the care type to "Full day (8+ hours)" using the available dropdown menus.
In the personal details section, enter child name "Lena Ortiz" and date of birth "2023-04-02."
In the nursery selection section, set the district filter to "East" and click on the first nursery in the resulting list to add it as your primary choice.
Click the "Save and continue" or "Next" button to proceed to the next step of the application with that start date and nursery selected.

entities.name: Nursery
entities.description: Municipal nurseries and daycare centers available for search, favorites, applications, and visits.

fields.name: distanceFromHomeKm
fields.description: Precomputed distance from the single user's home in kilometers for filtering/sorting.

fields.name: ratingAverage
fields.description: Average rating in stars (e.g., 4.5).

fields.name: ratingCount
fields.description: Number of ratings used to compute the average.

fields.name: opensByTimeWeekday
fields.description: Earliest regular weekday opening time in HH:MM for filters like 'opens by 07:00'.

fields.name: hasFullDayCare
fields.description: True if nursery offers full day (8+ hours) care.

fields.name: hasHalfDayCare
fields.description: True if nursery offers half-day schedules.

fields.name: acceptedAgeMinMonths
fields.description: Youngest child age accepted, in months.

fields.name: acceptedAgeMaxMonths
fields.description: Oldest child age accepted, in months.

fields.name: baseMonthlyFee
fields.description: Representative lowest monthly fee for display and simple fee filtering.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency code for fees, e.g., 'EUR'.

fields.name: hasLargeOutdoorPlayground
fields.description: True if a large outdoor playground is available.

fields.name: hasNutFreeMenu
fields.description: True if nursery offers a nut-free menu.

fields.name: hasLactoseFreeOptions
fields.description: True if nursery offers lactose-free meal options.

fields.name: mealsDescription
fields.description: Text shown in Meals & Nutrition tab.

fields.name: facilitiesDescription
fields.description: Summary of facilities (playground, rooms, etc.).

fields.name: openingHoursDescription
fields.description: Human-readable overview of opening hours.

entities.name: NurseryOpeningHours
entities.description: Day-of-week opening hours for each nursery, used in detail views and advanced filters.

fields.name: openTime
fields.description: Opening time in HH:MM, e.g., '07:00'.

fields.name: closeTime
fields.description: Closing time in HH:MM.

fields.name: isClosed
fields.description: True if closed for the entire day.

entities.name: NurseryFeeSchedule
entities.description: Age- and care-type specific monthly fee schedules per nursery, used for precise fee filtering and display.

fields.name: ageMinMonths
fields.description: Minimum age in months for which this fee applies.

fields.name: ageMaxMonths
fields.description: Maximum age in months for which this fee applies.

fields.name: monthlyFee
fields.description: Monthly fee amount for this age range and care type.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency code, e.g., 'EUR'.

fields.name: validFrom
fields.description: Start date from which this fee is valid.

fields.name: validTo
fields.description: End date until which this fee is valid.

entities.name: FavoriteNursery
entities.description: Nurseries saved to the single user's favorites list.

fields.name: nurseryId
fields.description: ID of the saved nursery.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: When this nursery was added to favorites.

entities.name: VisitSlot
entities.description: Bookable visit time slots per nursery and date, shown on the visit booking page.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date of the visit (date component used).

fields.name: startTime
fields.description: Slot start time in HH:MM, e.g., '09:00'.

fields.name: endTime
fields.description: Slot end time in HH:MM, e.g., '11:00'.

fields.name: isBooked
fields.description: True if this slot is no longer available.

entities.name: VisitBooking
entities.description: Confirmed or in-progress visit bookings for nurseries.

fields.name: nurseryId
fields.description: Nursery being visited.

fields.name: visitSlotId
fields.description: Booked VisitSlot, if the booking is tied to a predefined slot.

fields.name: visitDateTime
fields.description: Combined date and start time of the visit.

fields.name: endTime
fields.description: End time in HH:MM if needed for summary.

entities.name: Application
entities.description: Nursery place applications created via the application wizard, including single- and multi-nursery applications.

fields.name: desiredStartDate
fields.description: Requested start date for care (date component used).

entities.name: ApplicationNurseryPreference
entities.description: Ranked nursery choices attached to an application (Preference 1, 2, 3…).

fields.name: preferenceOrder
fields.description: 1 for top preference, 2 for second, etc.

fields.name: selectedRatingAtCreation
fields.description: Nursery rating at the time it was added, used for display.

entities.name: ActivityCenter
entities.description: Centers hosting activities and holiday programs (may be nurseries or other municipal centers).

fields.name: isNurseryCenter
fields.description: True if this center is also a nursery.

entities.name: Activity
entities.description: Individual activities and holiday program sessions that can be registered for.

fields.name: centerId
fields.description: Center where the activity takes place.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the activity (date component used).

fields.name: startTime
fields.description: Start time in HH:MM.

fields.name: endTime
fields.description: End time in HH:MM.

entities.name: ActivityRegistrationList
entities.description: Temporary list of activities the user is registering for in one batch.

fields.name: childName
fields.description: Name used for all activities in the registration list.

fields.name: numChildren
fields.description: Number of children being registered (e.g., 1).

entities.name: ActivityRegistrationItem
entities.description: Individual activity entries within an ActivityRegistrationList.

entities.name: FeePlan
entities.description: Saved fee calculator plans such as 'My chosen schedule'.

fields.name: name
fields.description: User-defined label for the plan.

entities.name: CalendarDay
entities.description: Calendar entries indicating whether municipal nurseries are open or closed on specific dates.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date.

fields.name: note
fields.description: Optional note about holidays or reduced service.

entities.name: ContactInquiry
entities.description: Messages sent via the general contact form, optionally linked to a nursery (e.g., meals/allergies).

fields.name: nurseryId
fields.description: Nursery this inquiry refers to, if any.

entities.name: HomeLocation
entities.description: The single user's home location, used to compute or interpret distance filters (e.g., within 3 km).
